_description: Monthly review entries for Scale path. Append-only — one per month after Monthly Review operation. KPI snapshot includes Cross-Step KPIs (Rule of 40, NDR, Org-Checkup™ / LH-Score) which are written to path_state.cross_kpis on completion. Subphase-aware: 3.1 = Three Gates + Cash-Trough refresh, 3.2 = Org-Checkup score + Scorecard™ trends, 3.3 = Country P&L + Kill-Criteria-Status, 3.4 = Vector P&L + Pre-Sell-progress. Flags fire events for next session.

note: Example row — delete on first real Monthly Review.
